Bank of Korea Holds Policy Rate Steady at 2.5% Amid Iran War Inflation Risks (April 10, 2026) | YES | HIGH confidence** [5]

South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rose to 2.2% YoY (from 2.0% prior), undershooting forecasts of 2.4% despite oil price surges from the Iran conflict; core inflation eased to 2.2% [1][2]. The Bank of Korea's April 10 decision flagged inflation exceeding prior 2.2% fo
